title: nuxia glomerulata
intro: Nuxia glomerulata, also known as the forest-ivy or forest marigold, is a small evergreen shrub native to South Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nuxia glomerulata include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically to wounds and skin conditions.
